name: ChinaCache
description: First Chinese CDN provider offering content delivery, object storage, and live video streaming across 120+ cities in China.

seo.title: ChinaCache — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: ChinaCache: First Chinese CDN provider offering content delivery, object storage, and live video streaming across 120+ cities in China.

when_to_use: CDN acceleration for Chinese domestic websites and apps
Live video streaming across 120+ Chinese cities via edge PoPs
Object storage with CDN for media companies in mainland China
DDoS protection and security CDN for China-based services
Static asset delivery optimized for Chinese mobile networks

pros: First-mover with long history in China CDN
Live streaming and object storage bundled
cons: Lost ground to Alibaba, Tencent, and Wangsu
Aging platform versus modern edge clouds
review.verdict: Legacy Chinese CDN with brand history but shaky financials, pick newer rivals like Wangsu for greenfield work.
review.best_for: Legacy contracts inside China with existing ChinaCache relationships
review.not_for: New deployments needing modern edge compute and reliable financial backing
